description: In this episode of the Delphi Podcast, host Tommy interviews Smoky, co-founder of Barachain, discussing the unique approach of their project in the crypto space, emphasizing fun and community engagement while navigating the challenges of growth and decentralization.
topic_summary: Tommy and Smoky explore Barachain's innovative approach to creating a vibrant community in the crypto space, balancing humor and seriousness while discussing the project's evolution and future challenges [t=1:20].
